text.tspan: u2022 the new service stays decoupled from legacy's accidents of history
u2022 when legacy is finally retired, only the ACL changes u2014 new service untouched
u2022 legacy's weird conventions don't poison the new domain model
u2022 single place to add caching, rate-limiting, fallback
u2022 testable in isolation: mock legacy or mock ACL
u2022 ACL is often disposable u2014 thrown away when legacy is gone
u2022 translate calls New u2192 Legacy
u2022 translate responses Legacy u2192 New
u2022 map IDs, types, statuses, error codes
u2022 cache lookups, retry on transients
u2022 NEVER let legacy concepts leak
